content: In the 'fusion_mismatch' log, are wheel-based speed and machine-selected speed consistent with each other? Answer yes or no.

content.text: I'll cross-check the wheel-based and machine-selected speed in the 'fusion_mismatch' log.
The fusion check shows wheel-based speed (~12.0 km/h) and machine-selected speed (18.0 km/h) differ by ~6.0 km/h, which is flagged as not consistent.
